items.title: S01E01 - Pilot
items.summary: Detective Ezekiel Stone was murdered in 1983 and sent to hell for having previously murdered his wife's rapist. Now he is being sent back to Earth to help track down escaped demonic souls, giving himself a second chance.

infolabels.title: Pilot
infolabels.plot: Detective Ezekiel Stone was murdered in 1983 and sent to hell for having previously murdered his wife's rapist. Now he is being sent back to Earth to help track down escaped demonic souls, giving himself a second chance.

items.title: S01E02 - Heat
items.summary: Stone goes to L.A. to find his wife, but encounters a college student whose rage sets her lovers on fire.

infolabels.title: Heat
infolabels.plot: Stone goes to L.A. to find his wife, but encounters a college student whose rage sets her lovers on fire.

items.title: S01E03 - Encore
items.summary: Pursuing a serial rapist, Stone discovers that it is the man who raped his wife 15 years ago.

infolabels.title: Encore
infolabels.plot: Pursuing a serial rapist, Stone discovers that it is the man who raped his wife 15 years ago.

items.title: S01E04 - Repentance
items.summary: Stone's newest escapee target is a Nazi collaborator who is taking the eyes from the homeless, but there's more then meets the eye.

infolabels.title: Repentance
infolabels.plot: Stone's newest escapee target is a Nazi collaborator who is taking the eyes from the homeless, but there's more then meets the eye.

items.title: S01E05 - Poem
items.summary: With the help of a Chinese teacher, Stone pursues an escapee who kills young immigrant Chinese women and takes their blood.

infolabels.title: Poem
infolabels.plot: With the help of a Chinese teacher, Stone pursues an escapee who kills young immigrant Chinese women and takes their blood.

items.title: S01E06 - Executioner
items.summary: A damned soul is offing people who have gotten away with their crimes,or who he thinks has gotten away from there crimes. He electrocutes them, and leaves nothing left of the victims.At first it looks like the culprit is Lambert, but it is soon discovered Willy the Janitor is the vigilantee. In the end,Stone ultimately sends Willy a one-way trip back to Hell.

infolabels.title: Executioner
infolabels.plot: A damned soul is offing people who have gotten away with their crimes,or who he thinks has gotten away from there crimes. He electrocutes them, and leaves nothing left of the victims.At first it looks like the culprit is Lambert, but it is soon discovered Willy the Janitor is the vigilantee. In the end,Stone ultimately sends Willy a one-way trip back to Hell.

items.title: S01E07 - Slayer
items.summary: One of the escapees, Hasdrabul Skaras, approaches Stone and offers him a deal: if Ezekial joins forces with him and turns against the Devil, Hasdrabul will share the power that he plans to take on Earth. Stone prefers to regain his humanity on his own. In return, Hasdrabul, a Carthaginian warrior over a thousand years old, uses his Hell-developed power to blend into the shadows to first vanish before Stone can take him down, and then start killing the widows of ""fallen warriors"" (i.e., policeman killed in the line of duty), as Carthaginian ritual demands. Stone tries to stop him, helping one of the widows to escape from both Skaras and the police guard. Outclassed, Stone hides in Father Horn's church and uses the flickering light of the candles to spot Hasdrabul and make a throw that puts out Skaras' eyes and sends him back to Hell.

infolabels.title: Slayer
infolabels.plot: One of the escapees, Hasdrabul Skaras, approaches Stone and offers him a deal: if Ezekial joins forces with him and turns against the Devil, Hasdrabul will share the power that he plans to take on Earth. Stone prefers to regain his humanity on his own. In return, Hasdrabul, a Carthaginian warrior over a thousand years old, uses his Hell-developed power to blend into the shadows to first vanish before Stone can take him down, and then start killing the widows of ""fallen warriors"" (i.e., policeman killed in the line of duty), as Carthaginian ritual demands. Stone tries to stop him, helping one of the widows to escape from both Skaras and the police guard. Outclassed, Stone hides in Father Horn's church and uses the flickering light of the candles to spot Hasdrabul and make a throw that puts out Skaras' eyes and sends him back to Hell.

items.title: S01E08 - Ashes
items.summary: One of the Hell escapees is destroying religious buildings, but Stone discovers it's someone closer to him then he could have possibly thought.

infolabels.title: Ashes
infolabels.plot: One of the Hell escapees is destroying religious buildings, but Stone discovers it's someone closer to him then he could have possibly thought.

items.title: S01E09 - Lovers
items.summary: Two escapees(Jocelyn and Paco)are living the high life,and leaving dead bodies in the process.

infolabels.title: Lovers
infolabels.plot: Two escapees(Jocelyn and Paco)are living the high life,and leaving dead bodies in the process.

items.title: S01E10 - Carrier
items.summary: The newest escapee is Typhoid Mary. She's back on Earth and up to her old tricks. Worse, her typhoid is a hundred times worse for having been bathed in the flame of Hell.

infolabels.title: Carrier
infolabels.plot: The newest escapee is Typhoid Mary. She's back on Earth and up to her old tricks. Worse, her typhoid is a hundred times worse for having been bathed in the flame of Hell.

items.title: S01E11 - Faces
items.summary: Stone befriends a physically abused boy whose alternate personality wants to take revenge on his foster father.

infolabels.title: Faces
infolabels.plot: Stone befriends a physically abused boy whose alternate personality wants to take revenge on his foster father.

items.title: S01E12 - It's a Helluva Life
items.summary: The Devil gives Ezekial a chance to revisit his life, but Zeke is unaware there's a more sinister plan afoot.

infolabels.title: It's a Helluva Life
infolabels.plot: The Devil gives Ezekial a chance to revisit his life, but Zeke is unaware there's a more sinister plan afoot.

items.title: S01E13 - Mourning After
items.summary: Following his former wife home on Valentine's Day, Stone discovers that escapees from Hell have taken over the neighborhood and one of them is dating her.

infolabels.title: Mourning After
